name: realtek-ameba
title: Realtek Ameba RTOS
description: Realtek Ameba family of Wi-Fi + Bluetooth Low Power IoT SoCs. Backed by the official ameba-rtos SDK.

ameba-rtos.title: Ameba RTOS SDK
ameba-rtos.description: Realtek official ameba-rtos SDK (https://github.com/Ameba-AIoT/ameba-rtos) with built-in CMake/Ninja build system. Wraps `ameba.py build/flash/clean` so PlatformIO drives the upstream toolchain directly. SDK is cloned by platform.py on first build (no submodules, ~30 MB). Override with $AMEBA_SDK_DIR for a local checkout, or $AMEBA_SDK_GIT_URL for a fork/mirror.
